C:\tools\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sRenderer.dir/objects.a
C:\tools\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sRenderer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sRenderer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\tools\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sRenderer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o D:\Emacs\home\works\softRenderer\home\bin\sRenderer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,D:\Emacs\home\works\softRenderer\home\bin\libsRenderer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\sRenderer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
